author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Replaced the file-level allow(clippy::redundant_closure) with a proper macro-level fix. The unary_oracle / binary_oracle / bool_oracle macros now take a bare `$func:path` and pin its concrete type via an internal `let func: fn(...) -> ... = $func;` binding. This monomorphizes the generic ufunc to (Array<f64,IxDyn>) -> ... so callers write `unary_oracle!(oracle_sin, "sin.json", ferray_ufunc::sin)` without a closure, turbofish, or suppression. Removed the file-level allow and the explanatory comment. All 50 oracle tests still pass; 206 ufunc tests; clippy clean. Closing.
